name: Baked, Pressed Tofu
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain most of the water from a pressed block of tofu using a towel.
2. Cut the tofu into slices or cubes.
3. Mix the flour and favorite spices in a shallow dish.
4. Dip the tofu pieces first in soy sauce, then coat them evenly with the flour/spice mixture.
5. Place the coated tofu on an oiled or non-stick baking tray.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20-30 minutes, turning the tofu once to ensure even browning.
7. If a more browned appearance is desired, broil under low heat for an additional 5 minutes before serving.
